MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Jan-15-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HYUNDAI MOTOR AMERICA MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION

Appearances (by Zoom):
David Christy, Esq. 310-933-4271 Quill & Arrow for Plaintiff.
Adam Knighton, Esq. 213-328-0864 Theta Law Firm for Defendant.

10:14am The clerk calls the case. The proposed order submitted by Mr. Christy is incomplete

10:15 the Court takes a 5-minutes recess for Counsel to resubmit a proposed order which is verbatim with the court's ruling.

10:24 Court is back in session. The Court reads langauge on TR re submission of the proposed order. Mr. Christy responds to the court. The Court looks at the incomplete proposed order submitted at 10:07.

ARGUED. Mr. Knighton contests and argues; broad, language does not work, warranty. Court comments. Mr. Christy agrees with TR. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant's motion to compel arbitration and stay.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
